summary: Russia announced systematic strikes on defense industry facilities in Kyiv, with Lavrov notifying the US of these operations. Ukrainian forces are conducting deep strike operations against Russian logistics routes near Mariupol, while drone threats continue across northern and eastern regions. A 18-year-old was detained in Kyiv for adjusting Russian strikes during the May 24 mass attack.
key_points: Russia announced systematic strikes on Ukrainian defense industry facilities in Kyiv, with Lavrov notifying US Secretary Rubio (Source: @UkraineNow/81462)
Ukrainian Azov National Guard published footage of strikes on Mariupol-Taganrog and Mariupol-Volnovakha logistics routes (Source: @DeepStateUA/23534)
18-year-old detained in Kyiv for adjusting Russian strikes during May 24 mass attack, found with correspondence and strike aftermath photos (Source: @UkraineNow/81454)
UK, France, Italy, Spain, and Canada blocked NATO proposal requiring 0.25% GDP annual military aid to Ukraine (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30399)
Russian strikes on Kyiv's Shevchenkivskyi district killed 2, injured 92 including 3 children, destroying entrance of 5-story building (Source: @UkraineNow/81458)
Drone threats reported across Chernihiv, Poltava, Sumy, Kharkiv, Dnipropetrovsk, and Zaporizhzhia regions with multiple strike groups active (Source: @eRadarrua/93681)
Russian Defense Ministry confirmed strike on Ukrainian Ground Forces command building and Lukyanovka/Artem missile production plant (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30410)
Belarusian opposition leader Tikhanovskaya arrived in Kyiv (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30403)

sections.executive_summary: Russia announced systematic strikes on defense industry facilities in Kyiv, with Foreign Minister Lavrov directly notifying US Secretary Rubio of these operations. Ukrainian forces are expanding deep strike capabilities against Russian logistics routes near Mariupol, while drone threats continue across multiple northern and eastern regions. A mass Russian attack on Kyiv killed 2 and injured 92, with Ukrainian counterintelligence detaining a teenager who adjusted strikes.

points: Ukrainian Azov National Guard 1st Corps published footage of strikes on Russian logistics routes Mariupol-Taganrog and Mariupol-Volnovakha, critical supply lines for occupied territories (Source: @DeepStateUA/23534)

18-year-old detained near Ministry of Defense facility in Kyiv for adjusting Russian strikes during May 24 mass attack, found with curator correspondence, geolocations, and strike aftermath photos (Source: @UkraineNow/81454)
Russian strikes on Kyiv's Shevchenkivskyi district killed 2 people, injured 92 including 3 children, destroying entrance of 5-story building from 1st to 5th floor (Source: @UkraineNow/81458)
SBU detained Russian fire corrector in Donetsk region and eliminated Russian fighter with call sign 'Shaman' who was conducting reconnaissance near Liman (Source: @UkraineNow/81445)
Ukrainian Air Force spokesman Ignat stated Russia is well aware of air defense missile quantities supplied by Western partners (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30423)
Preparations began for circular defense in Volyn populated areas near Belarus border, reported by Kovel district administration head Andrey Cheren (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30402)
President Zelensky stated Ukraine has stabilized the front and achieved greater results this year than previously (Source: @UkraineNow/81459)
Russian Foreign Ministry announced systematic strikes on Ukrainian defense industry facilities in Kyiv, with Lavrov notifying US Secretary Rubio (Source: @UkraineNow/81462)
Russian Defense Ministry confirmed strike on Ukrainian Ground Forces command building and Lukyanovka plant (Artem missile production facility) (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30410)
Russia recommends foreigners leave Kyiv and residents avoid military and administrative infrastructure (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30420)
Two Tu-95MS bombers conducting redeployment from Olenya airfield to Far East (Source: @eRadarrua/93655)
Temporary restrictions on aircraft arrivals and departures introduced at Kaliningrad's Khrabrovo airport (Source: @eRadarrua/93636)
Russia planned provocation in Paris 'on behalf of Ukrainian nationalists' through sanctioned Social Design Agency (Source: @UkraineNow/81456)
Russian strikes on Pavlodar in Dnipropetrovsk region damaged apartment building, injuring men aged 18, 43, and 45 (Source: @UkraineNow/81443)
Strike drones active in Kharkiv region heading toward Kovyagi, with 7 strike groups targeting Balakliia, Bohodukhiv, Kharkiv, and Chuhuiv (Source: @eRadarrua/93681)
Strike drones in Sumy region with 3 strike groups heading toward Vorozhba, Krolevets, Nyzy, and Tokary (Source: @eRadarrua/93681)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bomb strikes on Sumy region (Source: @kpszsu/62736)
SBU eliminated Russian fighter 'Shaman' conducting reconnaissance near Liman in Donetsk region (Source: @UkraineNow/81445)
Strike drones in Dnipropetrovsk region with 1 strike group active (Source: @eRadarrua/93681)
Strike drones active in Chernihiv region heading toward Slavutych, Nizhyn, Horodnia, and Kotelva (Source: @kpszsu/62707)
Strike drones in Poltava region with 2 strike groups heading toward Zaturyn and Sosnivka (Source: @eRadarrua/93661)
Strike drones in Chernihiv region passing Nizhyn heading southwest (Source: @kpszsu/62710)
Preparations for circular defense underway in Volyn region near Belarus border (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30402)
Strike drones in Zaporizhzhia region with 1 strike group heading toward Mykolaivka (Source: @eRadarrua/93681)
Enemy reconnaissance drone detected in Black Sea near Odesa region, potentially guiding strike weapons (Source: @kpszsu/62737)
Ukrainian Azov forces struck Russian logistics routes Mariupol-Taganrog and Mariupol-Volnovakha (Source: @DeepStateUA/23534)
Ballistic weapons threat reported for Dnipropetrovsk region on northwest course (Source: @kpszsu/62760)
Multiple strike drone groups active across Poltaha, Sumy, Kharkiv, Dnipropetrovsk, and Zaporizhzhia regions (Source: @eRadarrua/93681)
Russian tactical aviation conducted guided aviation bomb strikes on Sumy region (Source: @kpszsu/62736)
Ballistic weapons launched toward Dnipropetrovsk region on northwest course (Source: @kpszsu/62760)
Enemy reconnaissance drone operating in Black Sea near Odesa region (Source: @kpszsu/62737)
Ukrainian Air Force confirmed Russia has detailed knowledge of Western-supplied air defense missile quantities (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30423)
All clear issued for ballistic weapons threat (Source: @kpszsu/62735)

key_developments: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov notified US Secretary Rubio that Russian forces are beginning systematic strikes on defense industry facilities in Kyiv, with Russia recommending foreigners leave the city (Source: @UkraineNow/81462)

Ukrainian Azov National Guard 1st Corps published footage of successful strikes on critical Russian logistics routes Mariupol-Taganrog and Mariupol-Volnovakha, demonstrating expanding deep strike capabilities (Source: @DeepStateUA/23534)

Ukrainian counterintelligence detained an 18-year-old in Kyiv who adjusted Russian strikes during the May 24 mass attack, finding correspondence with curators and documentation of strike aftermath (Source: @UkraineNow/81454)

UK, France, Italy, Spain, and Canada blocked a NATO proposal requiring alliance members to provide Ukraine with military aid equivalent to at least 0.25% of GDP annually (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30399)

Russian forces struck Kyiv's Shevchenkivskyi district killing 2 and injuring 92 including 3 children, while also hitting the Ukrainian Ground Forces command building and Artem missile production plant (Source: @UkraineNow/81458)

Multiple strike drone groups remain active across northern and eastern Ukraine with 7 groups in Kharkiv, 3 in Sumy, 2 in Poltava, and 1 each in Dnipropetrovsk and Zaporizhzhia regions (Source: @eRadarrua/93681)
Russia planned a provocation in Paris to desecrate Charles de Gaulle's monument 'on behalf of Ukrainian nationalists' through the sanctioned Social Design Agency (Source: @UkraineNow/81456)
sections.threat_assessment: The conflict is escalating with Russia announcing systematic strikes on defense industry facilities in Kyiv and notifying the US of these operations. Ukrainian forces are responding with expanded deep strike capabilities against Russian logistics, particularly near Mariupol. The detention of a teenage strike adjuster in Kyiv indicates Russian intelligence is recruiting youth for targeting operations, while drone threats persist across multiple regions.
sections.regional_response: Western alliance divisions emerged as UK, France, Italy, Spain, and Canada blocked a NATO proposal for mandatory 0.25% GDP military aid to Ukraine, while Poland, Netherlands, Baltic states, and Nordic countries supported it. Belarusian opposition leader Tikhanovskaya arrived in Kyiv, signaling continued regional opposition coordination. Russia is conducting GPS jamming near its borders, as demonstrated by the attack on British Defense Minister's aircraft near Estonia.
sections.intelligence_notes: Russian intelligence operations include recruiting young Ukrainians through Telegram for strike adjustment tasks, as demonstrated by the 18-year-old detainee who progressed from commercial photography to military targeting. The Social Design Agency, sanctioned by US, UK, and EU, continues conducting information operations including planned provocations in France and Germany. Russia possesses detailed intelligence on Western-supplied air defense missile quantities in Ukraine according to Ukrainian Air Force assessments.
